name: Explorium
description: B2B business and prospect data via Explorium's hosted MCP server. Tools (match/fetch/enrich businesses and prospects, business events, enrollments) are discovered dynamically from the MCP endpoint at register time.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Explorium integration

apiKey.description: Explorium API key, or a SecretRef object the host resolves before the plugin reads the value.

mcpUrl.description: Explorium MCP endpoint URL. Defaults to the hosted endpoint; override for staging or self-hosted MCP.

authHeader.description: HTTP header name used to send the API key to the MCP endpoint. Defaults to 'api_key'. Override (e.g. to 'Authorization') if Explorium documents a different header.

authValuePrefix.description: String prepended to the API key in the auth header value. Defaults to empty (raw API-key auth). Set to 'Bearer ' for bearer-token schemes.

toolCacheTtlSec.description: How long to cache the discovered MCP tool list on disk between cold starts. 0 disables disk cache.

enabled.label: Enable Explorium
enabled.help: Turn the integration on or off

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Explorium API key from your Explorium dashboard

mcpUrl.label: MCP endpoint
mcpUrl.help: Override only if Explorium has given you a non-default endpoint

authHeader.label: Auth header name
authHeader.help: Defaults to 'api_key'. Change only if Explorium documents a different header.

authValuePrefix.label: Auth value prefix
authValuePrefix.help: Defaults to empty (raw API-key auth). Set to 'Bearer ' for bearer-token schemes.

toolCacheTtlSec.label: Tool cache TTL (sec)
toolCacheTtlSec.help: How long to cache discovered MCP tools between cold starts
